text:
Created attachment 209057
Poudriere build log file

Poudriere build fails on 12.1 i386 with:
src/lib/prov/openssl/openssl_rc4.cpp:78:7: error: unknown type name 'RC4_KEY'; did you mean 'EC_KEY'?
      RC4_KEY m_rc4;
      ^~~~~~~
      EC_KEY

See attached build log
